title: Recall solutions for $$\sin$$ $$x$$ $$=$$ $$\frac{-1}{2}$$
text: You already found $$7\pi/6$$. $$What$$ $$is$$ $$the$$ $$other$$ $$solution$$ $$for$$ $$\sin$$ $$x$$ $$=$$ $$\frac{-1}{2}$$ in the given interval?

title: Next solution for $$\sin$$ $$x$$ $$=$$ $$\frac{-1}{2}$$
text: What is the next solution for $$\sin$$ $$x$$ $$=$$ $$\frac{-1}{2}$$ after $$7\pi/6$$ in $$(0$$, $$2\pi)$$?
